retry_reason: kmem_cache_destroy is a put operation that should only be called once; retrying would cause double-free.
contract_summary: This function destroys the amdgpu_sync slab cache by releasing the reference on the kmem_cache object. It should be called exactly once during module cleanup after all objects allocated from this slab have been freed. After this call, the slab cache pointer should be considered invalid. No further references to the slab cache should be used.
